title: Jedi Quest: The Final Showdown
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Redlink}} {{Book |image=[[File:JediQuest-TheFinalShowdown.jpg]] |title=''Jedi Quest: The Final Showdown'' |author=[[Jude Watson]] |cover artist=*[[Alicia Buelow]] *[[David Mattingly]] |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[November]] [[2004]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages=151 |isbn=043933926X |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]] |series=[[Star Wars: Jedi Quest|''Star Wars: Jedi Quest'']] |preceded by=[[Jedi Quest: The False Peace|''The False Peace'']] |followed by=''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' }} '''''Jedi Quest: The Final Showdown''''' is the tenth in a [[Star Wars: Jedi Quest|series]] of young reader novels that chronicle the adventures of [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] between [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] and [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']]. This book features a journey to Korriban to stop [[Granta Omega]], an enemy of the Jedi, along with [[Jenna Zan Arbor]], an evil scientist, from meeting a dangerous [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]. The Jedi meet many perils, including ancient visions, an entire army, and the dangers of the [[Valley of the Dark Lords/Legends|Valley of the Dark Lords]]. ''The Final Showdown'', written by [[Jude Watson]] brings one, debatable outcome: Is an uneasily obtained success worth a loss that could have been avoided? ==Publisher's summary==
'''Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker.'''
'''Master and apprentice.'''
'''Chosen by fate. Destined for conflict.'''
''Granta Omega is an evil mastermind who has one goal: to help the Sith destroy the Jedi Order. Now Omega has escaped to the planet of Korriban—home to the tombs of the ancient Sith Lords and their terrible secrets. Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker must stop him before his sinister power grows out of control.'' ''They are not alone on this mission. Anakin's rival, Ferus, is also searching for Omega, and Anakin sees this as a contest he must win. But as the dark side of the Force becomes stronger and stronger, there is only one guaranteed outcome for any showdown:'' ''Death.'' ==Plot summary== [[Granta Omega]], still desperate to curry favor with the secret [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]], arranges a meeting on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], ancient [[Sith Worlds/Legends|tombworld]] of the long-vanished [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]. A team of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] and their [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] arrives in time to stop this union. The Sith Lord, unseen by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], vanishes without a trace, as does [[Jenna Zan Arbor]], abandoning Omega and his impassioned vendetta. [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] is forced to [[Death/Legends|slay]] Omega in the ruins of a [[Sith temple/Legends|Sith temple]] when the unreasonable son of [[Xanatos]] will not relent. While on the [[Mission to Korriban (23 BBY)|mission to the dark side-enshrouded world]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] struggles with his feeling of rivalry toward [[Ferus Olin]]. With deep-seated jealousy he observes the growing friendship between Ferus and [[Tru Veld/Legends|Tru Veld]], his best friend among the Padawans. Anakin’s desire to see Ferus trip up causes him to keep quiet about a potentially disastrous repair Ferus has made on Tru’s [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. The [[Weapon/Legends|weapon]] fails in combat with [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]], leading to the death of Padawan [[Darra Thel-Tanis]]. Ferus resigns of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] as penance, while Anakin forever loses his friendship with Tru Veld. ==Continuity== The [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord’s]] presence was spoken of in the novel, but he was not specified as [[Dooku/Legends|Darth Tyranus]] until [[The Last of the Jedi: The Desperate Mission|''The Desperate Mission'']] ([[2005]]), the first book of [[Star Wars: The Last of the Jedi|''The Last of the Jedi'']] series. At one point in this story, the events in [[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games|''The Dangerous Games'']] ([[2002]]) were described as occurring six [[Standard year/Legends|years]] earlier, but the timeline fits in such events as being four years earlier. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Jedi Quest: The Final Showdown}} ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|043933926X}}; [[November]], [[2004]], [[Scholastic]], 151-page paperback *{{ISBN|1417645539}}; 2004, [[Tandem Library Books]], 151-page school/library binding *{{ISBN|3833212306}}; [[September]] [[2005]], [[Dino Entertainment]], 155-page [[Wikipedia:German language|German]] paperback ===Cover gallery=== File:JediQuest-TheFinalShowdown.jpg|Cover File:TheFinalShowdown-Legends.png|Legends File:JediQuest_10_De.jpg|German cover:
